title: Dyed Bundles
description: Adds a splash of colour to better organise your bundles!
body:
# Dyed Bundles
**Add a splash of colour to better organise your bundles! Introducing the ability to dye bundles in all shapes and sizes, allowing you to customize your mobile storage, decoration &  goodie bags with vibrant hues and personalized flair.**

![Bundles, arranged in a grid with 2 rows and 3 columns, dyed in different colours: (From left to right, top to bottom) magenta, grey, cyan, light grey, orange & lime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TfSq0uCz/images/4265895859461a9f0b0cfc14360e30913900cab9.png)
# ✅ Features
- **Dye Bundles** like you would Leather Armour, just combine Dyes with a Bundle in a Crafting Table
- **Undye Bundles** like you would Leather Armour, interacting with a Cauldron filled with Water 
- **5,713,438** different colours to be explored!
